case_title: RICHARD ETCHINGHAM VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ETCHINGHAM, RICHARD ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JPT DEANA SKAGGS, PARALEGAL; ERIC GUAJARDO, DPW; STARLA SOUSA FILED BY ETCHINGHAM, RICHARD THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ETCHINGHAM, RICHARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ETCHINGHAM, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-21-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DEANA SKAGGS, PARALEGAL FILED BY DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-21-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-21-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF RICHARD ETCHINGHAM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DEANNA SKAGGS PARALEGAL WITH WITNESS ERIC GUAJARDO, DPW. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
